mapper.sql: t.id, t.app_name, t.title, t.address_type, t.address_list, t.update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM executor AS t ORDER BY t.app_name, t.title, t.id ASC
SELECT FROM executor AS t WHERE t.address_type = #{addressType} ORDER BY t.app_name, t.title, t.id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO executor (app_name, title, address_type, address_list, update_time) values ( #{appname}, #{title}, #{addressType}, #{addressList}, #{updateTime} );
mapper.update: UPDATE executor SET app_name = #{appname}, title = #{title}, address_type = #{addressType}, address_list = #{addressList}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM executor AS t WHERE t.app_name = #{appname} LIMIT 1

SELECT FROM executor AS t
AND t.app_name like '%' || #{appname} || '%'
AND t.title like '%' || #{title} || '%'
ORDER BY t.app_name, t.title, t.id ASC LIMIT #{pagesize} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT count(1) FROM executor AS t
AND t.app_name like '%' || #{appname} || '%'
AND t.title like '%' || #{title} || '%'
